about.title: About GC AI Hub
about.subtitle: A comprehensive registry and transparency platform for artificial intelligence initiatives across the Government of Canada.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To promote transparency, accountability, and responsible innovation in the use of artificial intelligence across the Government of Canada by providing a centralized registry of AI systems and initiatives.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: A Government of Canada where AI systems are transparent, accountable, and aligned with Canadian values, fostering public trust and enabling departments to learn from and build upon each other's successes.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Open disclosure of AI systems and their impacts on government services and decision-making.

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Adherence to federal policies including the Directive on Automated Decision-Making and privacy legislation.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Facilitating knowledge sharing and reuse of AI solutions across departments.

projectRegistry.title: Project Registry
projectRegistry.description: Comprehensive catalog of AI systems with compliance tracking.

complianceTracking.title: Compliance Tracking
complianceTracking.description: Monitor ADS compliance, AIAs, and privacy requirements.

dataManagement.title: Data Management
dataManagement.description: Excel import/export aligned with GC registry standards.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.description: Natural language search and policy guidance.

phase1.title: Phase 1 (Complete)
phase1.description: Core registry functionality and project catalog

resources.title: Resources & Guidance
resources.subtitle: Essential resources for submitting AI projects, understanding compliance requirements, and navigating Government of Canada AI policies and guidelines.

submitProjects.title: Submit Projects
submitProjects.description: Learn how to submit your AI project to the registry

compliance.title: Compliance
compliance.description: Understand GC AI policies and requirements

designSystem.title: Design System
designSystem.description: GC Design System guidelines and components

submissionGuide.title: How to Submit Your AI Project

steps.step1: Gather basic information about your AI system including name, organization, and purpose
steps.step2: Determine primary users and development approach (in-house or vendor)
steps.step3: Identify compliance requirements including ADS status, AIA completion, and privacy considerations
steps.step4: Document current status, data sources, and outcomes
steps.step5: Review and submit your entry for inclusion in the registry

directive.title: Directive on Automated Decision-Making
directive.description: Official requirements for automated decision systems in the GC

aia.title: Algorithmic Impact Assessment
aia.description: Tool for assessing and mitigating risks of automated systems

privacy.title: Privacy Act & ATIP
privacy.description: Privacy and access to information requirements

openSource.title: Open Source Software
openSource.description: GC guidance on using and releasing open source

excelGuide.title: Excel Import & Export
excelGuide.description: The GC AI Hub supports import and export of project data using the official GC AI Registry Excel template.
excelGuide.importInstructions: To import data, ensure your Excel file matches the official template structure with all required columns.
excelGuide.exportInstructions: Export the current registry to Excel for offline analysis or archival purposes.
